powers.label: Run Doctor
powers.prompt: Run koda doctor and report the full results. Highlight any failures or warnings that need attention.

powers.label: MCP Status
powers.prompt: Check all configured MCP servers: which are connected, which have missing tokens, and which need setup. Provide instructions for any that need fixing.

powers.label: My Profiles
powers.prompt: List my installed profiles and what each one provides: agents, rules, and capabilities. Suggest additional profiles based on my role.

powers.label: My Workspace
powers.prompt: Show my current workspace configuration: team, profiles, projects, Jira prefix, and available agents. Suggest improvements if anything is missing.

powers.label: Available Workspaces
powers.prompt: List all available workspaces I can activate. Show: name, team, profiles, and description. Group by tier (vertical, team, sustainment).

powers.label: My Agents
powers.prompt: List all agents available to me with a brief description of what each does. Group by profile.

powers.label: What Can I Do?
powers.prompt: Based on my current profiles and workspace, explain what I can do: Jira integration, code review, testing, deployments, incident response, etc. Give 3-5 example prompts I can try.

powers.label: Suggest Workspace
powers.prompt: Based on my role and team, suggest which workspace I should activate. Ask me about my team, projects, and daily tasks to make a recommendation.

powers.label: Generate Standup
powers.prompt: Generate my daily standup update based on my Jira tickets. Include what I did yesterday, what I'm doing today, and any blockers.

powers.label: Explain a Ticket...
powers.prompt: Which Jira ticket should I explain? Provide the ticket key and I'll break down the scope, acceptance criteria, and context.

powers.label: Review a PR...
powers.prompt: Which PR should I review? Provide the repo and PR number and I'll check for quality, security, and testing issues.

powers.label: Ask Anything
powers.prompt: What would you like help with? I can assist with code, Jira, architecture, testing, documentation, or any other development task.
